sections.title: Overview
sections.content: Employees who wish to resign should follow the company's resignation policy, submit a formal resignation request, complete the required notice period, and finish the offboarding process.

sections.title: Notice Period
content: The notice period depends on the employment contract.
Employees are expected to complete all assigned work before leaving.

sections.title: Final Settlement
content: Salary will be processed according to company policy.
Unused leave balance may be included if applicable.
Company property must be returned before final clearance.

sections.title: Best Practices
content: Support knowledge transfer to your replacement.

content.question: How do I resign?
content.answer: Submit a resignation letter to your manager and follow the HR resignation process.

content.question: Do I have to complete the notice period?
content.answer: Yes, unless an exception is approved according to company policy.

content.question: When will I receive my final settlement?
content.answer: It will be processed after completing the clearance procedure according to company policy.
